title: bidens goiana
intro: Bidens goiana, also known as Bidens pilosa, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to South America and has been naturalized in many parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial effects. It has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Bidens goiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including tinctures and poultices.
